data.body:
=== VALIDATION SCORECARD: recall + precision on real DSO plans (E1 run, 240 runs, DSO data) ===
Ran the gold-set experiments against real DSO ticket plans (authorized as sample data). Writeup:
docs/experiments/plan-review-validation-scorecard.md; raw plan-review-gate/runs/{expA,expB,seedpilot}.jsonl.

RECALL (seeded known-bad per criterion -> want FAIL): 13/15 catch their defect, ZERO rubber-stamping. Caught:
G6(TOCTOU), T10(wildcard-IAM+plaintext-secret+local-state), T11(single-shot 50M migration), T12(100%-deploy),
T1(custom-consensus), T4(rename-public-API), T5a(LLM-per-row cost), T5b(inline-geocoder no-fallback),
T5c(PowerUser+committed-password), T9(non-atomic counter), E5(snapshot/source-grep test), COH(cross-section
contradiction), A1(framework-for-one-handler). Two exceptions are CORRECT not failures: T3 hedges AMBIGUOUS
single-turn (AGENT-tier - can't verify an API without tools); T5d one glitch (empty finding).

PRECISION/FALSE-FIRE on 12 REAL DSO plans (180 runs - the piece the pilot couldn't measure): the NEW criteria are
well-disciplined. New overlays T10/T11/T12/T5d/T1 cleanly PASS-N/A, ZERO false-fire. New judgment G6/COH/A1 never
false-FAIL (0/12) - they hedge AMBIGUOUS rather than manufacture a finding. ONE clear over-firer: E5 testing 9/12
FAIL -> confirms round-4 "E5 too strict"; THE tuning target. T5b 3/12, T4 2/12, T9 1/12 = plausible (no ground
truth - concurrent store, external calls).

AGENTIC GROUNDING (EXP C): codebase-grounded G6/A1 run WITH tools vs DSO repo resolve to concrete PASS or
substantive evidence-backed AMBIGUOUS (not the no-tools hedge) -> confirms the AMBIGUOUS-on-clean is a no-tools
artifact; route the codebase-grounded set (G6/T10/T11/T9/COH/A1/E4/G1G2) to the AGENT tier.

TUNING ACTIONS: (1) E5 too strict (9/12) - apply type-aware suppression + raise bar, re-measure; (2) T3 -> AGENT/web
tier; (3) track AMBIGUOUS-on-clean as the precision metric, tool-grounding is the lever; (4) harden structured-output
parse (T5d empty finding). CONFIDENCE: strong recall + near-zero false-fire on new criteria + no rubber-stamping;
finalize AFTER E5 retune + routing-grounded + the still-owed E4 generalization on a NON-DSO corpus (this round used
DSO, the same population the routing was tuned on).
